productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Pink Minnie Sunshine Kidswear
description: CompositionPink round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with slight puff on sleeves, green piping around neckline, and Minnie Mouse graphic on the front Wash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis pink Minnie Mouse tee from disney is perfect for your little princess. Minnie will keep your little girl company while she romps around in the park or runs around with her friends. The cotton tee keeps your little one dry and comfortable. It can be teamed with denim shorts or skirts for an enjoyable outing. Add on a pair of pretty footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, include colourful jibbitz, and transform your little darling into a princess.
